summary.en: Networked chargers for hotels, resorts, fleets, public parking, or utility-managed sites in Grenada should support OCPP back-office integration when required by the charge-point operator, owner, or utility programme. EMC and power-quality evidence should align with IEC 61000 expectations for conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, voltage dips, surges, and electrostatic discharge. Grenada's small island grid makes load management, remote monitoring, fault reporting, and demand control especially important where charger clusters are connected to constrained distribution feeders.
summary.zh: 格林纳达酒店、度假村、车队、公共停车场或公用事业管理场站的联网充电桩，在充电点运营商、业主或公用事业项目要求时，应支持OCPP后台集成。电磁兼容和电能质量证据应符合IEC 61000对传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、电压跌落、浪涌和静电放电的预期。格林纳达小岛电网条件下，当充电桩群接入受限配电馈线时，负载管理、远程监控、故障报告和需求控制尤为重要。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達酒店、度假村、車隊、公共停車場或公用事業管理場站的聯網充電樁，在充電點運營商、業主或公用事業項目要求時，應支持OCPP後台集成。電磁兼容和電能質量證據應符合IEC 61000對傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、電壓跌落、浪湧和靜電放電的預期。格瑞那達小島電網條件下，當充電樁群接入受限配電饋線時，負載管理、遠程監控、故障報告和需求控制尤為重要。

standards_or_laws: OCPP - Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charging back-office integration
IEC 61000 series - EMC, harmonics, flicker, immunity, surge, and ESD
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication
GRENLEC power-quality and service-connection review for connected loads

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. That vehicle-side protocol is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the IEC CCS2 communication stack. China-market chargers may have domestic operator platforms or proprietary cloud interfaces, but Grenada projects may require OCPP evidence, cybersecurity settings, SIM/router compatibility, and remote monitoring with the selected operator or site owner.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。该车端协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是IEC CCS2通信栈。中国市场充电桩可能具备国内运营商平台或专有云接口，但格林纳达项目可能要求OCPP证据、网络安全设置、SIM/路由器兼容性，以及与所选运营商或场站业主的远程监控。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。該車端協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是IEC CCS2通訊棧。中國市場充電樁可能具備國內運營商平台或專有雲接口，但格瑞那達項目可能要求OCPP證據、網絡安全設定、SIM/路由器兼容性，以及與所選運營商或場站業主的遠程監控。

standards_or_laws: China EMC test evidence for domestic deployment where applicable

gap.en: Exporters should confirm OCPP version, server endpoint testing, roaming/payment requirements if any, cellular or Ethernet hardware, data-security settings, remote fault reporting, demand-response or load-shedding functions, and IEC 61000 EMC reports. GB/T 27930 is not a back-office protocol and cannot satisfy OCPP integration for a Grenada project.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认OCPP版本、服务器端点测试、如有漫游/支付要求、蜂窝或以太网硬件、数据安全设置、远程故障报告、需求响应或限负荷功能，以及IEC 61000电磁兼容报告。GB/T 27930不是后台协议，不能满足格林纳达项目的OCPP集成要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認OCPP版本、伺服器端點測試、如有漫遊/支付要求、蜂窩或以太網硬件、數據安全設定、遠程故障報告、需求響應或限負荷功能，以及IEC 61000電磁兼容報告。GB/T 27930不是後台協議，不能滿足格瑞那達項目的OCPP集成要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional - mandatory where required by the utility, charge-point operator, fleet buyer, hotel/resort owner, public grant, or project specification; IEC 61000 EMC evidence should be expected for grid-connected electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-side communication protocol and is not an OCPP or IEC CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For networked Grenada deployments, verify OCPP back-office integration and IEC 61000 EMC evidence separately from China GB/T 27930 vehicle-side communication. Small-grid load management and remote fault reporting should be confirmed at project level.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对格林纳达联网部署，应将OCPP后台集成和IEC 61000电磁兼容证据与中国GB/T 27930车端通信分开核验。小岛电网的负载管理和远程故障报告应在项目层面确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對格瑞那達聯網部署，應將OCPP後台集成和IEC 61000電磁兼容證據與中國GB/T 27930車端通訊分開核驗。小島電網的負載管理和遠程故障報告應在項目層面確認。
